chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ التِّجَارَةِ وَ الْمُوَاظَبَةِ عَلَيْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 53 – The Preference of the business and the attentiveness over it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/131)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/131)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي قَدْ هَمَمْتُ أَنْ أَدَعَ السُّوقَ وَ فِي يَدِي شَيْ‏ءٌ قَالَ إِذاً يَسْقُطَ رَأْيُكَ وَ لَا يُسْتَعَانَ بِكَ عَلَى شَيْ‏ءٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Huzeyfa Bin Mansour, from Muaz Bin Kaseer Baya’a Al Aksiya who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I have thought that I shall leave the marketplace and in my hand is something (acquired wealth)’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Then (the value of) your opinion would deteriorate and no one would like to seek consultation with you upon anything’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur from Mu’adh ibn Kathir, Bayya’ al-Akyisah who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘I am thinking to quit doing business in market place while there is a certain amount of wealth in my hands.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Then your opinion becomes of no value and no one will seek help from you.’”
